title: Hello Gopher
description: Write a classic Hello World program in Go and understand the main package.
problemStatement:
Every Go program starts with a package declaration. Create a file with `package main`, import `"fmt"`, and write a `main()` function that prints `"Hello, Go!"` using `fmt.Println()`.

**Requirement:** The output must be exactly `"Hello, Go!"`.
hints: Go files must always start with a package name.
The `main` function is where your program's execution begins.
